last_substantive_baseline.title: Promote bounded live report publication
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves the bounded publication execution workflow and supporting repository controls were merged. It does not prove workflow dispatch, current pricing, effective role-assignment write permission, deployment, managed-identity publication, Blob response, browser rendering, or a committed live frontend source.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #41 merge commit observed before opening documentation-only reconciliation PR #43
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded observation. Resolve the live main head, PR state, reviews, CI, workflow runs, and Azure reality whenever this file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: This ChatGPT conversation — bounded Azure IaC project-state reconciliation explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Reconcile .project state and the current handoff to the live PR #41 merge. This documentation-only change does not modify workflows, scripts, infrastructure, Azure resources, permissions, deployments, runtime systems, or frontend source.
verification_criteria: live main head is recorded as c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e
PR #41 is recorded as merged and its source head 722dfcf99c367880147c9fd2f183d54d4d960f56 is preserved in review state
exact-head CI run 29976628311 and both successful jobs are preserved
owner-account technical review is distinguished from independent organizational approval
the execution workflow is described as present on main but not dispatched or operationally verified
Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, report publication, manual repair, and browser verification remain false or unobserved
the final PR diff remains limited to the two declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep PR #43 draft, inspect the exact validation or review finding, patch only the two declared paths, and do not dispatch workflows or authenticate to Azure.
authored_change.rollback: Close PR #43 without merge. No Azure, workflow, deployment, runtime, or frontend rollback applies because reconciliation performs no external mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning only. It does not authorize the merged publication execution workflow, deployment, RBAC changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

completed_increments.title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
Repair read-only planner RBAC evidence capture
Use ProviderNoRbac for read-only ARM planning
Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS

proven: exact reviewed commit checkout and bounded authority validation succeeded
Azure OIDC login and current resource-group and collector inventory succeeded
no tagged report Storage account or visible collector publication role existed
What-If contained 21 Ignore and exactly four Create changes
the creates were one Storage account, one Blob service, one $web Blob-only container, and one Storage-scoped collector role assignment
zero Modify, Delete, and Replace changes were present
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
unproven: current Storage pricing, quota, and policy allowance
current collector identity and publisher availability
browser rendering and committed live frontend source

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This is historical read-only planning evidence for commit d181c48bf718c65015f83e04e1bbf9a7bcf152f4. Re-resolve Azure state, cost, quota, permissions, collector identity, publisher availability, and exact Provider What-If immediately before any separately authorized deployment.

pr42_blob_endpoint_repair.claim_boundary: Architecture and read-only plan only; not Azure execution or browser proof.

pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository promotion is merged. No publication workflow run, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob/browser proof, or manual repair is established.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. The merged execution workflow is repository state, not authority; only the separate bounded read-only planning grant is an Azure-authentication exception.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
